text:
There once was a brave little squirrel whose name was Benny. Benny lived in a pine forest at the foot of a tall hill. Every morning, Benny woke up feeling lively and would take advantage of his early hours to explore and gather delicious acorns.

One morning, Benny noticed something unusual. A new bird had settled in a nearby branch. It wasn't just any bird; it had peculiar shimmering feathers.

Curious about this new feathered visitor, Benny approached cautiously. The bird fluttered its wings gracefully before speaking. "Hello little squirrel! I'm Azure Feather."

Over time, Azure became Benny's best friend. Not only did they chat away, but Azure could sing enchanting songs that would put any leaf in the trees to sleep.

One day, while exploring deeper into the forest, Benny stumbled upon an ancient-looking well. Beneath the glowing reflection was a glowing orb.

"Apollo's Heartstone?" Benny pondered aloud.
